MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NASIR SHEIKH APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA; DEFENDANTS BRIAN KITCHING AND CAROLYN KITCHING APPEARING WITH LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY SUSAN PETRO, ESQ.; THE CASE SETTLES; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANTS BRIAN KITCHING AND CAROLYN KITCHING AGREE TO VACATE THE PREMISES AT 2524 LOMBARD STREET BY FEB-13-2006 BY 5:00 P.M. PREMISES ARE TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION; PLAINTIFF WAIVES BACK RENT IF DEFENDANTS VACATE FEB-13-2006, 5:00 P.M.; IF DEFENDANTS FAIL TO VACATE, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE EX PARTE MOTION TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT.

PRO TEM JUDGE HENRY SHAIN; REPORTER: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA
